findings.description: The Action class code example in s5 omits two variable declaration lines that are present in the source: `W11AC01SearchForm searchCondition = formCtx.createObject();` and `CM311AC1Component component = new CM311AC1Component();`. The omission leaves the subsequent lines `component.selectByCondition(searchCondition)` referencing undeclared variables, making the code example technically incorrect and potentially misleading to an AI using it as an implementation reference.
findings.source_evidence: Source lines (in order): `W11AC01SearchForm searchCondition = formCtx.createObject();` then `CM311AC1Component component = new CM311AC1Component();` then `SqlResultSet searchResult = component.selectByCondition(searchCondition);`

findings.description: PascalCase class names `CM311AC1Component` and `W11AC01SearchForm` appear in the s5 code examples but are absent from the hints. These are class names from the source content that satisfy the V4 inclusion criteria.
findings.source_evidence: `CM311AC1Component component = new CM311AC1Component();` and `ValidationContext<W11AC01SearchForm> formCtx = ValidationUtil.validateAndConvertRequest("11AC_W11AC01", W11AC01SearchForm.class, req, "search");` in the Action class example
